title: Iran Agreed to Give Up Enriched Uranium in Deal Announced by Trump, U.S. Officials Say
summary_full: Precise details were unclear but the officials said the U.S. demanded a commitment from Iran on uranium as part of any initial agreement.
summary_public: Precise details were unclear but the officials said the U.S. demanded a commitment from Iran on uranium as part of any initial agreement.

IR.label: positive
IR.evidence: Iran Agreed to Give Up Enriched Uranium in Deal
